creator: Michael.Reifenberger.gp@icn.siemens.de
text:
After Downloading, adapting script.dat, running ./install -script script.dat
(thats the base installation) you logon as notes-user and do:
/opt/lotus/bin/http httpsetup
This leads in en endless loop producing to 'sigaltstack: too few memory'
on the console and endlessly: 
'kernel trap 12 with interrupts disabled
 kernel trap 9 with interrupts disabled'.

How-To-Repeat: Download and do it as described above.
